title: EventExtraction
description: LLM response schema for event extraction from a social media post (prompt1).

events.description: List of extracted events. Empty array if no events found.

title.description: Event title exactly as stated in the text, or null if not found.

description.description: Additional event details from the text, or null if not present.

place.description: Venue or location exactly as written in the text, or null.

datetime.description: Date and time in the original format from the text, or null.

start_datetime.description: Calculated fixed ISO 8601 date and time of the event start.

short_description.description: Short description of the event combining its details.

type.description: Event type from the allowed list.

confidence.description: Confidence score 1-5 based on completeness of extracted data.
